summary: FIN-P2 Sprint Testing Complete - All core finance domain features working correctly. Tested Money v2 dual-write, race-safe invoice numbering, tax profile deterministic pipeline, finance overview/subscriptions/ledger endpoints, CSV export RBAC, and webhook idempotency.

minor.issue: Initial login requests sometimes timeout (30s+) due to cold start, subsequent requests succeed

issues: React hydration warnings about <span> inside <tbody>/<option> - cosmetic only, functionality works

critical_code_review_comments: Money v2 dual-write working correctly: amount_minor, net_minor, tax_minor, gross_minor all populated on invoice creation
Tax profiles seeded correctly: TR_VAT_20 (2000 bps KDV), DE_VAT_19 (1900 bps VAT)
Invoice sequence uses FOR UPDATE lock ensuring race-safe numbering
meta_json includes money_v2 and tax_profile snapshots for audit trail
CSV exports restricted to super_admin only - RBAC working correctly
Webhook missing/invalid signature returns 400, idempotency via ProcessedWebhookEvent model
seed_data_creation: None required - tax profiles auto-seeded on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Finance domain v2 features complete. Tax profiles TR_VAT_20 and DE_VAT_19 are seeded. Invoice creation populates Money v2 fields (amount_minor, net_minor, tax_minor, gross_minor). CSV exports restricted to super_admin. Frontend pages at /admin/finance-overview, /admin/subscriptions, /admin/ledger all functional.

Race-safe invoice numbering.sequential_create_unique: PASS - 5 sequential creates all unique (DE-202603-000008 to DE-202603-000012)

Tax profile deterministic pipeline.same_input_same_output: PASS - 3 invoices with 99.99 EUR all produced net=8403, tax=1596, gross=9999

Webhook replay/idempotency.ProcessedWebhookEvent_model: PASS - exists with provider, event_id, event_type fields for dedup

Frontend admin routes./admin/finance-overview: PASS - loads with testids: admin-finance-overview-page, admin-finance-overview-title, filter inputs, metric cards
Frontend admin routes./admin/subscriptions: PASS - loads with testids: admin-subscriptions-page, admin-subscriptions-title, admin-subscriptions-table, admin-subscriptions-status-filter
Frontend admin routes./admin/ledger: PASS - loads with testids: admin-ledger-page, admin-ledger-title, admin-ledger-table, filter inputs
